spec.rawSql:
SELECT 
    e_source.entity_name as "Player",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Damage",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Healing"
FROM combat_logs l
JOIN entities e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.id
LEFT JOIN entities e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.id
LEFT JOIN powers p ON l.power_id = p.id
WHERE 
    l.log_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND p.attack_type != 'Power'
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (e_source.entity_type = 'Environment')
        OR (
            NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
            AND e_source.entity_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR e_victim.entity_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND p.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY e_source.entity_name
ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END) + 
          SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END)) DESC;

SELECT 
    e_victim.entity_name as "Target",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Damage Taken",
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END), 0) as "Healing Received"
FROM combat_logs l
JOIN entities e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.id
LEFT JOIN entities e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.id
LEFT JOIN powers p ON l.power_id = p.id
WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    AND p.attack_type != 'Power'
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (e_source.entity_type = 'Environment')
        OR e_source.entity_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR e_victim.entity_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
        OR p.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по типу воздействия
    AND (
        'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
        OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
        OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
    )
GROUP BY e_victim.entity_name
ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact ELSE 0 END) + 
          SUM(CASE WHEN l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact) ELSE 0 END)) DESC;

SELECT 
    $__timeGroup(l.log_timestamp, '5s') as time,
    e_source.entity_name as metric,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN 'heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            WHEN 'damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) / 5 as "DPS / HPS"
FROM combat_logs l
JOIN entities e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.id
LEFT JOIN entities e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.id
LEFT JOIN powers p ON l.power_id = p.id
WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    AND p.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND e_source.entity_name IS NOT NULL
    AND e_source.entity_name != ''
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (e_source.entity_type = 'Environment')
        OR e_source.entity_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR e_victim.entity_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
        OR p.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
    )
GROUP BY 1, 2;

SELECT 
    $__timeGroup(l.log_timestamp, '5s') as time,
    e_victim.entity_name as metric,
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN 'heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            WHEN 'damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0 THEN l.actual_impact
            WHEN 'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0 THEN ABS(l.actual_impact)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ) / 5 as "DPS / HPS Received"
FROM combat_logs l
JOIN entities e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.id
LEFT JOIN entities e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.id
LEFT JOIN powers p ON l.power_id = p.id
WHERE 
    $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    AND p.attack_type != 'Power'
    AND e_victim.entity_name IS NOT NULL
    AND e_victim.entity_name != ''
    
    -- Фильтр по атакующим
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR (e_source.entity_type = 'Environment')
        OR e_source.entity_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по целям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        OR ('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player')
        OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature')
        OR e_victim.entity_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
    )
    
    -- Фильтр по способностям
    AND (
        '$__all' IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
        OR p.power_name IN (${power_name:sqlstring})
    )
GROUP BY 1, 2;

spec.name: source_player
spec.label: Atacker/Healer

spec.query:
SELECT 
    __value,
    __text,
    __description
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'ALL_PLAYERS' as __value,
        '👤 All Players' as __text,
        'All players' as __description,
        -2 as sort_order
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        'ALL_ENEMIES' as __value,
        '🔴 All Creatures' as __text,
        'All enemies/creatures' as __description,
        -1 as sort_order

    UNION ALL
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.entity_name as __value,
        CONCAT('🌋 ', e.entity_name) as __text,
        'Environment' as __description,
        0 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Environment'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    UNION ALL

    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.entity_name as __value,
        CONCAT('👤 ',e.entity_name) as __text,
        'Player' as __description,
        1 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Player'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    UNION ALL

    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.entity_name as __value,
        CONCAT('🔴 ',e.entity_name) as __text,
        'Creature' as __description,
        2 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Creature'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
) subquery
ORDER BY sort_order, __text;

    __value,
    __text,
    __description
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'ALL_PLAYERS' as __value,
        '👤 All Players' as __text,
        'All players' as __description,

    UNION ALL

        'Environment' as __description,
        0 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Environment'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    UNION ALL

    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.entity_name as __value,
        CONCAT('👤 ',e.entity_name) as __text,
        'Player' as __description,
        1 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Player'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
    
    UNION ALL

    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.entity_name as __value,
        CONCAT('🔴 ',e.entity_name) as __text,
        'Creature' as __description,
        2 as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN entities e ON l.source_id = e.id
    WHERE 
        e.entity_type = 'Creature'
        AND $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
) subquery
ORDER BY sort_order, __text;

spec.name: impact_type
spec.label: Impact type

spec.query:
SELECT 'damage' as __value, '💥 Damage' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'heal' as __value, '💚 Healing' as __text
UNION ALL
SELECT 'all' as __value, '⚔️ All' as __text;

UNION ALL

UNION ALL

spec.name: power_name
spec.label: Power

spec.query:
SELECT 
    __value,
    __text,
    __description
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        COALESCE(p.power_name, p.power_id) as __value,
        COALESCE(p.power_name, CONCAT('⚠️ ', p.power_id)) as __text,
        CONCAT('Uses: ', COUNT(*)) as __description,
        CASE WHEN p.power_name IS NULL THEN 2 ELSE 1 END as sort_order
    FROM combat_logs l
    JOIN powers p ON l.power_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN entities e_source ON l.source_id = e_source.id
    LEFT JOIN entities e_victim ON l.victim_id = e_victim.id
    WHERE 
        $__timeFilter(l.log_timestamp)
        -- фильтр по выбранным source_player
        AND (('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Player')
            OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${source_player:sqlstring}) AND e_source.entity_type = 'Creature')
            OR e_source.entity_name IN (${source_player:sqlstring})
        )
        -- фильтр по выбранным victim_player
        AND (('ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Player')
            OR ('ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring}) AND e_victim.entity_type = 'Creature')
            OR (NOT 'ALL_PLAYERS' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND NOT 'ALL_ENEMIES' IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
            AND e_victim.entity_name IN (${victim_player:sqlstring})
        )
        )
        -- фильтр по impact_type
        AND (
            'all' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring})
            OR ('damage' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact > 0)
            OR ('heal' IN (${impact_type:sqlstring}) AND l.actual_impact < 0)
        )
        AND p.attack_type != 'Power'
    GROUP BY p.power_name
) subquery
ORDER BY sort_order, __text;
